contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 90
- Description: Phase 3b — Butterfly Effect partner-branded certificate PDFs live
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agentic_ai_context/pull/151
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/lineage-engine/pull/11
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/lineage-credentials/pull/12
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/truesight_me_beta/pull/117
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/truesight_me_prod/pull/6
  
  Details:
  Shipped Phase 3b end-to-end across 5 PRs in 4 repos. Butterfly Effect program now issues partner-branded certificate PDFs using Bilal's PDF template; cohort listing populated with sample participants; certificate available as a download from each credential page.
  
  PRs (all squash-merged):
  
  1. agentic_ai_context#151 (a8667a7) — Spec §17.13: two-strategy dispatch. certificate.strategy on the program manifest selects pdf_overlay (partner-supplied PDF + overlay coordinates) or html_template (default; stub branch deferred until needed). Coordinate convention documented (PDF points, bottom-left origin).
  
  2. lineage-engine#11 (e3b3048) — Implementation. New scripts/cert_overlay.py module uses pypdf + reportlab to merge a fresh text+QR canvas atop the partner template. build_cv_cache.py extended with _load_cert_config + _resolve_issued_at + _render_program_certificate helpers; dispatch on cert_config.strategy after the per-program QR loop. Vendored under program_assets/butterfly-effect/: cert_template.pdf (Bilal's blank, 859x612pt, Narowal Public School cohort design), cert_config.json (overlay coordinates measured against rasterized template), fonts/EBGaramond-Italic-VariableFont_wght.ttf (754KB from google/fonts OFL repo).
  
  3. lineage-credentials#12 (81244cd) — Sample cohort. New programs/butterfly-effect/ with manifest.json + two pk-hash dirs:
     - pk-wR9zU8JMnEz1 (Gary's existing capoeira pk-hash — build merges by pk_hash so this is accreted onto his unified CV under slug gary-teh)
     - pk-DEMO-BILAL-LEAD (synthetic placeholder for Bilal as program lead; build merged it into his existing DAO-contribution slug 'bilal' by name match)
     Each pk-hash has a single demo module-completion event. Replace pk-DEMO-BILAL-LEAD when Bilal onboards a real DAO identity via dao_client auth.py login.
  
  4. truesight_me_beta#117 (ca77981) + truesight_me_prod#6 (96cf863) — Page wiring. Butterfly Effect manifest status onboarding → active; certificate.{strategy, available, label} added; js/program-shell.js renderCredential picks up manifest.certificate.available and surfaces a primary 'Download certificate' button above the existing 'Download credential PDF' (now secondary). Backwards-compatible: programs without certificate.available (tribomirim today) keep showing only the credential PDF button. Tiny CSS for .credential-downloads two-button row added to both program cred pages.
  
  Live verification (https://truesight.me/programs/butterfly-effect/):
    - members.html cohort: ['Gary Teh', 'Bilal']
    - credentials/#bilal: two download buttons render — 'Download certificate' → bilal__butterfly-effect__cert.pdf, 'Download credential PDF' → bilal__butterfly-effect.pdf
    - programs.html: Onboarding pill no longer shown on Butterfly Effect (status active)
    - Decoded sample QR via pyzbar earlier: → 'https://truesight.me/programs/butterfly-effect/credentials/#bilal'
  
  Sample certificate rendered for Bilal (and Gary): partner template intact, name overlaid above 'PRESENTED TO' underline in EB Garamond Italic 34pt navy, date 'May 18 2026' above the Date label, QR with Butterfly Effect logo tucked in the bottom-right corner inside the ornamental border. Same template/overlay code will work for every future Butterfly Effect participant — onboarding new members is now just: add their pk-hash data to lineage-credentials/programs/butterfly-effect/, push, the GH Action regenerates the cohort listing + per-participant cert PDF automatically.
  
  Open for follow-up:
    - QR placement coordinates are operator-proposed; if Bilal wants different spot, single-field edit in lineage-engine cert_config.json.
    - Phase 3b.2: lift cert_config from lineage-engine into truesight_me program manifest (spec §17.13.5 source-of-truth alignment); deferred since current layout works.
    - Replace pk-DEMO-BILAL-LEAD with Bilal's real DAO identity when convenient.
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh
- TDG Issued: 150.00
- Attached Filename: N/A
- Destination Contribution File Location: N/A
--------

Verify submission here: https://dapp.truesight.me/verify_request.html
rubric: 100TDG For every 1 hour of human effort
